hero.description: Seika turns study material into something you actually want to open. Quizzes, flashcards, and a coin economy that pays you back for paying attention.

features.description: Whether you're running a class of forty or studying alone at midnight, the same tools stay sharp.
features.socialProofDesc1: of partner schools report measurable retention gains within a single semester.

flashcards.title: Flashcard decks that stick.
flashcards.desc: Build personal decks or browse public collections. Spaced repetition remembers what you forgot so you don't have to.

quizzes.title: Smart quizzes, instantly graded.
quizzes.desc: Instant scoring, detailed breakdowns, and a progress map that actually shows you where to go next.

marketplace.title: Spend coins on real study material.
marketplace.desc: Premium quiz packs and flashcard decks from educators worldwide, priced in the coins you've already earned.

rewards.title: Learning pays off. Literally.
rewards.desc: Every completed quiz drops coins into your wallet. Spend them in the marketplace, or save them up for the premium pack you've been eyeing.

leaderboards.title: Leaderboards that actually update.
leaderboards.desc: Real-time rankings across your cohort, school, and the wider community.

notifications.title: Notifications tuned to what you care about.
notifications.desc: New content drops, quiz results, milestone unlocks — without the noise.

about.description: Two engineers who thought studying didn't have to feel like a chore, and decided to do something about it.
about.cuongBio: Loves building things that make people laugh while they learn. Refuses to ship a boring onboarding flow.
about.datBio: Full-stack developer who treats every state transition like a small piece of choreography. Gamer by night.
about.missionText1: Make education feel less like a
about.missionText2: and more like a game worth coming back to.

contact.description: A bug, a feature request, or just a hello — we read every message.
contact.replyTime: We typically reply within a day. Sometimes faster — sometimes with a fix you didn't know you needed.

footer.tagline: Quizzes, flashcards, and a coin economy for learners who want education to feel less like a chore.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Seika. Crafted with care in Hà Nội.

notFound.title: Page not found.
notFound.description: The path {{path}} doesn't lead anywhere we know about.
